name: spglobal-plugin
description: S&P Global financial data and analytics skills for Codex, including company tear sheets, earnings previews, funding digests, and Capital IQ Excel workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Financial research and analytics skills powered by S&P Global data.
interface.longDescription: Use S&P Global data in Codex for company tear sheets, earnings previews, funding digests, and Capital IQ-backed Excel workflows. Requires access to the S&P Global LLM-ready API or Capital IQ data where noted by each skill.
defaultPrompt: Generate a business development tear sheet for Palantir.
Give me an earnings preview for Salesforce.
Create a Capital IQ Excel model for NVIDIA.
